triggers: Core scanner scoring logic — change affects the performance grade/score of every scan
Public-facing scan API (/api/v1/scans/[id]) output shape is extended
Parses an external API response (Google PageSpeed Insights / CrUX field data)
non_triggers: No user authentication or session logic touched
No new PII — the target URL is already sent to Google PSI today; CrUX is public origin/URL-level aggregate data; no new data egress
No payment, billing, or Stripe/tier-gating change (performance scan is free-tier, not gated)
No admin/privileged controls, no file upload / user-generated content
lane_rationale: User explicitly chose the broader overhaul; also the default/fail-safe lane. feature-full runs all three Phase-4 reviewers.
bounded_constraint_round_reason: Requires risk_level HIGH AND >=3 tags (or explicit user request). risk_level is MEDIUM, so it does not trigger.
security_auditor_note: Not HIGH and no auth/pii/payment/public-API-auth risk_flag, so Opus/max is not force-mandated; however feature-full still runs the security-auditor, and per Model Assignment the security-auditor uses Opus regardless.
